title: CreativeInput
description: Unified creative input structure containing all fields needed for any ad format (weave, tail, product_card, bridge, followup). Brand agents generate this structure, and operators transform it into format-specific creatives.

description.description: Single description field. Contextual to the query, max 300 characters.
description.example: CRM built for growing teams, with AI-assisted workflows and intelligent pipeline management.

value_props.description: Short value propositions or bullet points

cta_label.description: Call-to-action label, smart based on product (e.g., 'Start Free Trial', 'Request Demo', 'Learn More')

cta_url.description: Call-to-action URL, selected from available resource URLs based on query relevance

resource_urls.description: Destination or tracking URLs available for use

fallback_formats.description: Fallback ad formats if preferred format is not available

followup_query.description: Optional sponsored follow-up query string to execute when user selects the follow-up. Used in headless follow-up ad format for AI platforms with existing follow-up suggestion UI. Generated automatically by brand-agents based on product and context.
followup_query.example: Compare Nimbus CRM Pro vs Salesforce pricing and features

offer_id.description: Optional offer identifier when creative is generated from a specific offer. Used for tracking and analytics.

offer_summary.description: Optional offer summary text when creative is generated from a specific offer. Contains the offer details and pricing information.
offer_summary.example: Get 20% off your first 3 months with annual billing

examples.description: CRM built for growing teams, with AI-assisted workflows and intelligent pipeline management.
